title: Worked Example -  Countdown to a deadline

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate a countdown to a deadline, starting from a user-defined day and counting up to day 10 using a forward counter loop. The program asks the user for the starting day and then prints how many days are left until the deadline.

---

sampleTestCases.output:
Day 5: 6 days left until deadline
Day 6: 5 days left until deadline
Day 7: 4 days left until deadline
Day 8: 3 days left until deadline
Day 9: 2 days left until deadline
Day 10: 1 days left until deadline
